summary: Tested bulk message feature on /coach/board. All acceptance criteria passed: message-list-btn visible on Watch List (non-empty, non-Committed), modal opens with correct title/confirmation, subject+body fields editable, send disabled when empty, cancel closes modal, successful send shows toast '2 messages sent to Watch List.' and closes modal. Backend POST /coach/messages/bulk returns {sent:2, skipped:0, skipped_names:[], list_name} correctly. CSV/PDF export buttons present. Old message-all-btn testid not present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bulk message features working. Coach has 2 players on Watch List. Backend uses token-based auth (not Bearer JWT - it's a UUID token from /api/coach/auth/login). Committed column correctly has no message-list-btn button.
